name: A Very Simple Puzzle...
short_description: Discover a simple and relaxing solitaire with A Very Simple Puzzle. Match three cubes of the same color to unlock the next one. Can you reach the final cube? With its minimalist aesthetic and laid-back gameplay, this game is perfect for a short, zen break, and can be completed in around two hours.
detailed_description:
In this minimalist puzzle, your objective is simple: match three cubes of the same color to unlock the next color.

But don’t be fooled by the simplicity of the mechanics — as you progress, space starts to run out, and you’ll need to be organized and clever.

This short game has no time limit, allowing you to play at your own pace and relax.

The total experience lasts around two hours, making it perfect for a quick session or a relaxing break in a busy day. A Very Simple Puzzle isn’t meant to be a stressful challenge but rather a moment of relaxation and satisfaction, each time you reach a new level.

Its immediate accessibility makes it a game for everyone, appealing to both casual players and puzzle enthusiasts.

Will you manage to reach the final cube?

Features:

🎯 Simple concept: Match three cubes of the same color to unlock new elements and progress in the game.

⌚ Duration: A complete experience in about two hours, perfect for a short break or a moment of calm between activities.

🎮 Intuitive interface: A game that's easy to pick up, suitable for all types of players, whether they’re beginners or puzzle fans. Compatible with both keyboard and controller.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
